title: declanplayz232's Fun Mod
description: A mod for people who want to experience a whole new kind of minecraft.
body:
Ever wanted minecraft... but utterly insane?
Well look no further, traveler! This mod compiles months and months of hard work and effort.

declanplayz232's fun mod adds multiple new recipes that change the game in more ways than one. Wanted to make french fries? You can! Ever wanted to clean blocks with Windex? Of course! The more interesting part is now to craft these items, you must collect each individual element.

Make a air bottler for oxygen and nitrogen. Use a compressor to create Hyxozylenthol! (don't drink it)

Includes a new mob: Rivers Cuomo, Bluest of Albums.

Also includes a phone and  computer, and Ruins which have new armour and sorts.

Most of the game is explained in the two madness manuals in the game currently.

So what are you waiting for?

-Note- The PublicNote Password is declanplayz232.
